title: [ExportVerilog] Struct assignment patterns not supported for all tools

features.name: packed struct output with struct literal assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with a packed struct output port and a struct literal assignment using the '{member: value} syntax

features.name: struct member-by-member assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include a struct output assignment using individual member assignments rather than struct literal syntax
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic [31:0] a; } out;
assign out.a = 32'h20;
